creator: msb@epost.de
text:
The current ports/irc/irssi port is not usuable for me on
both recent -CURRENT and -STABLE systems. 
I get a:

-!- Irssi: Looking up irc.west.gblx.net
-!- Irssi: Unable to connect server irc.west.gblx.net port 6667 [Invalid
          argument]

when trying to connect via /server <servername>.
Same for other servers.

Fix: 

Update the port to version 0.7.96.
How-To-Repeat: Just try connecting to a server yourself.
